Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: A conversation between the user and the AI agent

userId.description: UID of the user who owns this chat

title.description: User-facing title for the chat session

lastMessage.description: Snippet of the most recent message in the chat

updatedAt.description: Last time the chat was updated

createdAt.description: When the chat was first created

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single exchange in a chat conversation

userId.description: UID of the user who owns this message

text.description: The textual content of the message

imageUrl.description: URL to a generated image, if applicable

isImage.description: Flag indicating if the message is primarily an image

chats/{chatId}/messages.description: Subcollection of messages within a chat
